violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw chicken portioned and placed into freezer to freezer was above frozen ready to eat deli meats.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use trays and case of plastic ware stored on floor.
General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -No screen available at pass through window.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. -Large presense of flies in kitchen today. *Stated window and door had been left open earlier in the day.
